_comment: Manifest of fixture files for /create-case. Each entry maps a fixture display name to its Google Drive file id inside the team's Supio QA shared drive (drive id 0ABN1KXZHE2OUUk9PVA, AUTO subfolder 1-KrKSmynJ_KhqSYstEttxrw6RnqHsmDq). The /create-case skill consults this when populating a new case. Entries are downloaded on demand via scripts/google-drive.py (OAuth, drive.readonly) into fixtures/cache/ (gitignored). Add new entries when a PR introduces a behavior the existing fixtures don't exercise; the covers_event_types annotation tells future scenario design which Drive file produces which timeline event types.

Police Report.Pdf.notes: Canonical police-report fixture used as a default for /create-case. ~2.8 MB.

MRnMB.pdf.notes: Combined Medical Records + Medical Bills fixture. Default for /create-case alongside Police Report.Pdf — together they cover incident + medical record + medical bill event types. ~1 MB.

Medication.pdf.notes: Medication-specific fixture. Use --add when a scenario asserts on medication events distinct from the broader medical-record bucket. ~4.4 MB.

Incident_Report.pdf.notes: Smaller stand-in for police_report (~348 KB, 4 pages). Kept for legacy run-id 2026-05-08_1524_SUP-7623; new specs should prefer 'Police Report.Pdf'.

MedicalRecords.pdf.notes: Smaller stand-in for medical-record fixture (~752 KB, 16 pages). Kept for legacy run-id 2026-05-08_1524_SUP-7623; new specs should prefer 'MRnMB.pdf'.

bill UMPC.pdf.notes: Standalone medical-bill fixture. Use --add when a scenario needs a discrete bill event distinct from MRnMB's combined coverage.
